project.name: AI 可视化教学平台
project.designRead: educational dashboard / AI researchers and students / technical-professional / information-dense / avoid generic blue-purple gradient
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Dark cyberpunk dashboard inspired by industrial IoT control centers. Deep navy background with teal-cyan (#00d4aa) primary accent and purple (#7c3aed) secondary. High information density with three-column layout, real-time data visualization feel, glassmorphic card surfaces with subtle glow borders.

styleContinuityAnchors.layoutSystem: Three-column dashboard: left sidebar (navigation tree + system status), center content (primary workspace), right panel (quick actions + logs). Fixed top navigation bar with logo + menu tabs + search.
styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: Deep navy (#0a0e1a) base, teal-cyan (#00d4aa) primary accent, purple (#7c3aed) secondary accent. Multi-color semantic status: green=success, amber=warning, red=error, cyan=info.
styleContinuityAnchors.cardSystem: Glassmorphic cards with subtle borders and glow-on-hover. Rounded corners (8-12px). Surface layering via background color depth rather than heavy shadows.

pages.title: 首页概览
pages.visualNorthStar: IoT control center dashboard: top nav with logo + 8 tabs + search, left sidebar with connection tree + system gauges (CPU/memory/temp circular gauges) + network traffic mini chart + user profile, center area with 6 metric cards (total/online/offline/alert/messages/health) with colored icons, network topology hub-spoke diagram with animated connections, 4 real-time data monitoring line charts, bottom data transmission terminal panel

continuityAnchors.colorSystem: Teal-cyan primary, purple secondary on deep navy
continuityAnchors.cardSystem: Glassmorphic metric cards with glow borders

pages.title: Self-Attention 详解
pages.visualNorthStar: Interactive tutorial with 8 collapsible steps: formula review → build input → Q/K/V projection → scaled dot-product → weighted sum → multi-head → PyTorch validation → full class. Left sidebar with 4 sliders (d_model, num_heads, seq_len, temperature) + radio (language) + config summary card. Each step has code output blocks, data tables, and Plotly heatmaps. Step badges with numbered circles.

continuityAnchors.layoutSystem: Three-column layout, left sidebar with parameter controls
continuityAnchors.cardSystem: Expander sections with colored left borders

pages.title: 注意力热力图
pages.visualNorthStar: Attention explorer: left sidebar with text input, sliders (d_model, num_heads, temperature), selectbox (init method). Center: overall heatmap → multi-head grid breakdown (2x2 or 3x3) → output projection table. Right panel: temperature explanation expander + attention interpretation tips.

pages.title: 模型游乐场
pages.visualNorthStar: Toy language model trainer: left sidebar split into model architecture (d_model, num_heads, num_layers, d_ff sliders) and training params (lr, epochs, batch_size, dropout sliders). Center: training data textarea → start training button + status → loss curve chart → text generation input/output. Right panel: model config card + training log messages (scrollable timeline).

continuityAnchors.colorSystem: Same palette, orange accent for training status

leftSidebar.content: Two config card groups with sliders

pages.title: Transformer 块
pages.visualNorthStar: Architecture visualization: left sidebar with model config sliders (d_model, num_heads, d_ff, num_layers) + d_k/d_v metrics. Center: Encoder block ASCII art diagram → step-by-step tensor shape table (18 rows, styled) → parameter count metric cards (4 columns). Decoder block diagram → Encoder vs Decoder comparison cards (2 columns). Positional encoding formula card + PE dataframe. Right panel: formula quick reference.

pages.title: 梯度流分析
pages.visualNorthStar: Gradient explorer: left sidebar with config sliders (d_model, num_heads, seq_len, seed). Center: forward pass summary → manual backprop derivation formulas → gradient norm bar chart (colorful bars) → attention weight heatmap → gradient flow per-parameter stats (3 columns) → vanishing/exploding detection multi-layer line chart → PyTorch autograd comparison. Right panel: gradient interpretation tips.

continuityAnchors.colorSystem: Same palette, gradient colors for bars (cyan/blue/purple/orange)
continuityAnchors.cardSystem: Bar charts, line charts, info boxes
